201.description: The request has succeeded and a new resource has been created as a result.

post.description: Register a machine client per the auth.md protocol. Three identity types are supported: `anonymous` (returns an API key immediately with pre-claim scopes), `verified_email` (kicks off OTP, returns a claim_token), and `identity_assertion` with assertion_type=`urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:id-jag` (verifies a signed ID-JAG and issues a key bound to the asserted identity).
Initiate the email-verification claim flow for a previously-issued anonymous registration. Sends a 6-digit OTP to the supplied email and returns a claim_attempt_id.

Complete the email-verification claim flow by submitting the OTP. On success the registration's claimStatus flips to email_verified, post-claim scopes are unlocked, and an API key credential is returned.
Accept a logout+jwt push from a trusted assertion provider to revoke a previously-issued credential. Body is a signed JWT with media type application/logout+jwt per RFC 8417.
Validates the 6-digit code and returns API credentials if correct. Code expires after 5 minutes.
Sends a 6-digit verification code to the email. Always returns sent: true to prevent email enumeration.
Validate a VidLang spec against enabled rules. Rules are off by default — caller must enable at least one. Daily limit: 100/day (resets 00:00 UTC).

code.description: 6-digit verification code emailed to the principal.

claim_token.description: Opaque claim_token returned from the initial /v1/auth/agent call.

email.description: Email address to send the verification code to.

expires_at.description: Unix epoch ms when this claim attempt expires.

requested_credential_type.description: Requested credential type. Currently only api_key is supported.

assertion.description: Signed identity-assertion JWT (ID-JAG) issued by a trusted assertion provider.

credential_type.description: Credential type returned, when issued immediately. Omitted on flows that require claim_token first.

credential.description: Live credential (API key) issued by the server, when one is issued immediately.

credential_expires.description: Unix epoch ms when the credential expires, or null/undefined for non-expiring keys.

scopes.description: Scopes the credential is authorized for at issue time.

post_claim_scopes.description: Scopes that will be added after the claim flow completes.

claim_url.description: URL the agent should direct the principal to in order to complete claim/verification.

claim_token.description: Opaque token used to complete the claim flow.

claim_token_expires.description: Unix epoch ms when the claim_token expires.

assertion.description: Email address the agent asserts on behalf of the principal.

rules.description: VidLang rules config. All rules off by default — enable explicitly. E.g. { "VL013": true, "VL003": false, "VL011": { "severity": "warning" } }

riskScore.description: Composite risk score 0-100 computed deterministically from violation severities.

policySnapshotDate.description: ISO date of the newest active policy snapshot this scan was evaluated against.

disclaimer.description: Informational disclaimer. This response is not legal advice.

text.description: Exact quoted clause from the platform's policy page.

sourceUrl.description: URL to the source policy page (may include #anchor).

policyVersion.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the policy snapshot this citation was drawn from.

timestamp.description: Timestamp (seconds) in the source video where the evidence appears.

visualDescription.description: Short description of the visual evidence, if any.

text.description: The text to evaluate — caption, ad copy, draft script, upload description, etc.

kind.description: Optional label for logs; does not affect rule selection.

context.description: Optional publication metadata that affects risk (caption, hashtags, monetization intent).

videoUrl.description: Public URL of the video to scan.

format.description: Optional content format hint. Inferred from duration when omitted.

context.description: Optional publication metadata that affects risk (caption, hashtags, monetization intent).

ruleId.description: Stable identifier of the matched rule in our compliance corpus.

category.description: Rule category, e.g. monetization, community-guidelines, ad-policy, copyright, minors.

explanation.description: Plain-language reasoning tying the video to the cited rule. Informational, not legal advice.

DailyLimits.description: Per-endpoint daily request limits, keyed by endpoint name (fixed window, resets 00:00 UTC).

text.description: Disclaimer text. Use \\n for line breaks. Kept fine-print style at the bottom of the frame.

fontSize.description: Font size in pixels. Defaults to 2.2% of video height (fine-print).

resultUrl.description: CDN URL of the disclaimed video

project.description:
The serializable timeline document (Twick ProjectJSON: tracks, assets,
metadata, version). Stored opaquely; the editor owns its shape.

mediaUrl.description: URL of the video to extract from

frames.description: Frame indices to extract. Use [0, 75, 150] for specific frames, 'auto' for 3 evenly spaced, or 'last' for the final frame

metadata.description: Return video metadata (width, height, fps, duration). Defaults to true

dailyLimits.description: Per-endpoint daily request limits (fixed window, resets 00:00 UTC).

text.description: Overlay text. Use \\n for line breaks.

fontSize.description: Font size in pixels. Defaults to 4% of video height.

resultUrl.description: CDN URL of the overlaid video

dailyLimits.description: Per-endpoint daily request limits (fixed window, resets 00:00 UTC).
